nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Session (Neutral State)
nodes.description: Home screen during an active focus session. Header shows 'SESIÓN ACTIVA' badge and 'Estás en la zona.' headline. Central timer card displays recovered time (13:03) with circular progress ring and countdown (quedan 21:57). Session stats show 45min session and 13min clarity. 'Finalizar sesión' red CTA button. Below: PROTECCIÓN ACTIVA section showing 3 blocked apps (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) with Descanso badge. 'Tu ritual de hoy' section with 0 routines added and a 'Configurar rutinas del ritual' prompt card. 'Mi aprendizaje del día' section visible at bottom. Bottom tab bar: Home (active), Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil. Right panel: Mentex Tweaks debug panel showing Auth (DEV), Estado=Activo, Acento=Color principal (teal), Estilo de cards=Glass, Tipografía options (Geist/Inter/Manrope).

nodes.label: Active Session Timer Card
nodes.description: Dark card with circular progress ring showing recovered focus time (13:03) and remaining countdown (21:57). Displays session metadata: 45min de sesión, 13min de claridad. Red 'Finalizar sesión' button at bottom of card.

nodes.label: Protección Activa Bar — App Blocking Indicator
nodes.description: Green shield icon with 'PROTECCIÓN ACTIVA — 3 apps fuera de tu mente' label and 'Descanso' badge on right. Shows blocked apps as pill chips: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube.

nodes.label: Tu Ritual de Hoy Section — Empty State
nodes.description: Section titled 'Tu ritual de hoy' with subtitle 'Sin rutinas — agrega las que quieres practicar'. Contains a prompt card 'Configurar rutinas del ritual' with subtext 'Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más' and a + icon.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Debug Panel
nodes.description: Developer debug overlay panel labeled 'Mentex Tweaks'. Sections: AUTH (DEV) with navigation shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO (Inactivo/Activo toggle set to Activo), ACENTO (Color principal with teal swatch), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano toggle, Glass selected), TIPOGRAFÍA Familia (Geist/Inter/Manrope options).

nodes.label: Bottom Tab Bar — 5-tab Navigation
nodes.description: Persistent bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: Home (casa/house icon), Explorar, IA, Comunidad, Perfil. Home tab active in home-active-neutral and empty-state screens.
